title: evolvulus altissimus
intro: Evolvulus altissimus, also known as tall blue daze, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. Evolvulus altissimus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, and is also used in aromatherapy due to its calming and soothing effects.
